name: papermate
description: Early-stage human-in-the-loop thesis writing runtime for Chinese university workflows

scripts.test:papermate-agent-team: node scripts/papermate-agent-team.test.js && node scripts/papermate-router-host.test.js && node scripts/paper-writer-agent-team.test.js
scripts.smoke:papermate-router: echo {"goal":"survey papers and draft related work for a biomedical QA thesis","executionMode":"swarm","searchMode":"mock"} | node scripts/papermate-router-host.js
